entry.title: Change Milestone Dates via ABAP
entry.content:
Hi guys,

I have two fields, which I wanted to change over an SAP Standard Function / Method etc. The fields are MLST-EDATU and MLST-LST_ACTDT. Does anyone know an SAP Standard Function etc. to do that? Or can I do it directly on the database with an UPDATE?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Internal Error in Analyze_ACT_FieldCat
entry.content: I am also facing same issue please guide me

entry.title: Re: GRC Tuesdays: Hidden Gems – SAP Watch List Screening for Simplified Due Diligence and Compliance
entry.content:
Hello @pj14

Thank you for your question.

We have integrated the existing documents on the basis of customer requirements and requirements from the integrating applications.
If you would like other document types to be integrated, you will need to contact the corresponding process owners (e.g., customer returns) and ask them to integrate with SAP International Trade (including SAP Watch List Screening). 

Best regards,
Valentin

entry.title: Re: Build and Run Multi-Tenant SaaS Solutions on the SAP BTP
entry.content:
Partner Reference Application “Poetry Slam Manager” replaces the “Author Readings”-app

We deprecated and archived the SME Partner Reference Application “Author Readings” and replaced it with its successor, the Partner Reference Application “Poetry Slam Manager”.

The new Partner Reference Application comes with a new developer journey to make it easier to get started and quickly build a scalable, multi-tenant application.

In a nutshell the new journey starts with building the business core of the application focusing on entity models and business logic.
The second step “Make it scale” focuses on multitenancy enablement and the tenant lifecycle of customer subscriptions.
After having the deployment and management of multi-tenant applications up and running, the third step adds the integration with ERP solutions – you can start with the ERP backend of your choice.
Finally, the journey adds features and BTP services to the multi-tenant application.  

Developer journey following the partner reference example

Key highlights beyond this redesign of the developer journey:

  • Refactored ERP-agnostic design with integrations to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, SAP Business One and SAP Business ByDesign.
  • Bill of materials details with BTP services used and quantities required based on a sample sizing as a basis for cost calculations.
  • Simplified multi-tenancy configuration.
  • Second web app to manage poetry slam visitors to explain the navigation between web apps.
  • SAP Cloud Logging service for observability.

entry.title: Re: Build and Run Multi-Tenant SaaS Solutions on the SAP BTP
entry.content:
Update October 2024

With the latest update of the Partner Reference Application “Poetry Slam Manager” we added a bunch of new capabilities and BTP services:

  • Create and print PDF documents using the SAP Forms Service by Adobe and the SAP Print Service.
  • Connect an email server and send formatted emails.
  • Tutorial on SAP HANA Cloud Tools with details on how to estimate the required size of the SAP HANA Cloud database.
  • Upgrade to the latest CDS version 8 including a simplified subscription handling and multi-tenancy configuration using CDS version 8 capabilities.
  • Expanded explanation of the SAP Custom Domain Service and its usage in multi-tenant applications.
  • Description of how to unsubscribe service broker instances.
  • Creation of test data by a user action instead of csv-files.

entry.title: Re: Transport the Initial Business Configuration Content...
entry.content: great, thank you !

entry.title: Fehler beim Aufruf des SuccessFactors Learning Moduls - Blocked by CORS policy
entry.content:
Beim Aufruf der E-Learning Einheiten im Learning Modul kommt die Fehlermeldung hoch:

Access to XMLHttpREquest at ' landOnPortalHome.do:1 https://.....cloud.sap/.. 'from origin' https://....' has been blocked by CORS policy: No ' Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header is prenset on the requested resource.

dann die Fehlermeldung GET https:// .....net: : ERR_FAILED 404 (Not Found)

Er springt von der Basis Domain  https://hcm...auf die sf Domain https://xyz...

Hat jemand hier eine Lösungsvorschlag, vielen Dank

MfG

entry.title: Source list: valid date
entry.content:
Hi 

I have a source list already created with a contract assigned but with validity in the past. The contract also finished. I creat a new contract for the same supplier, plant, material etc. Then i try to update the source list not trough the contract, directly in ME01. When I create the new register, the system display the following message:

"Valid until" date must not be in the past"

Why I have to update the old register to a date in the present, if it is no more valid, and im adding a new register from now on. What is the best practice related to the source list update?

Thanks for the help.

Re: Customer Delivery - Stock in Transit (EHP5 - LOG_MM_SIT functionality)

I've two questions if you dont mind and glad to hear back when you are avaliable ;

1-I've tried to follow everything in your steps but unable to post vlpod bcs of getting error : Update control of movement type is incorrect (entry 601 _ _ T L).  Could you please guide me where should I check exactly ? 

I've already check business function LOG_MM_SIT seems active , on hana 1709.  

2-Does this work for MTO scenario?

Thanks .

entry.title: How to get Manager hierarchy in API pull
entry.content:
Hi, I am pulling data into a data lake through the API and am wondering if anyone knows how to get Person's manager, Manager +1, Manager +2, Manager +3, etc. in the same api pull? 

Could i do the lookup manager's manager etc all the way 10 levels away, yes. BUT I fear when I'm trying to see the hierarchy as of the employees term date it wont give me 100% correct results. Right? A manager could be in Sales and had 10 terms mid month and then by month end they moved to Finance and if we apply the month end hierarchy those 10 terms will show up in finance if we use the hierarchy when they should show up in sales. Right?

Anyways.... making the API work for me instead of a million calculations in the lake. 

I want to have the bottom option where i can see Manager +1, +2, etc. to make a hierarchy where the CEO will be level 1, level 2 will be his direct reports. etc. 

Obviously story reports are different but this is how I was able to get it to work in story reports

entry.title: Transition from Custom CDSView to other apps
entry.content:
Hi Expert！

I create the list in the Custom CDSView app.
I would like to know if it is possible to move to other screens from the list created in the Custom CDSView app.

For example, I created a Service Contract item list in the Custom CDSView app.
I want to move from the Service Contract item list created in the Custom CDSView app to the Service Contract Display.

Is this possible by creating a CDSView?

Soma

entry.title: Where-used list for manage global hierarchies
entry.content:
Dear all, 

is there any option to get information, where node from Manage global hierarchies is used? We use groups or nodes created in this app e.g. in allocation cycles. 

I am asking because we use this app, but we miss this functionality from e.g. Manage profit center groups, Manage cost center groups, Manage cost element groups, where we can see, where this node is used. I cant simply find this functionality, but maybe it is available via other app?

Thank you

Martina_J

entry.title: Correction of Uploaded Sales Data
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We are reaching out to you because we are experiencing an issue with some sales data that we manually uploaded to the system. Upon reviewing the uploaded file, we found errors in many of the sales entries, and we need to correct these and re-upload the data after making these corrections.

Could you please let us know how we can make these corrections and overwrite the already uploaded sales data? Is there a way to do this on our end? This is critical for us, as we currently have sales records with incorrect data. Could you please provide the steps we should follow to make these corrections?

Thank you in advance for your help.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Correction of Uploaded Sales Data
entry.content:
According to the explanation provided at the SAP Emarsys Help document below, the best option to clean up incorrect sales data is to perform a smart insight reload:

  • SAP Emarsys Help: Reloading data into Smart Insight

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content: @CarlosAccorsi Thank you for the update above for note 3537136.  With the new SECURE 2.0 logic, I believe there are two new constants - 401HC and BN109.  Those are not mentioned in this note.  Do you know what note those will be delivered in?

entry.title: Open Hub added fields avoid data reload
entry.content:
Hi all,

I've added a few non-key fields to my OpenHub definition (BW 7.5). When I transported these changes to our QAS system, it returned with error code 8 saying "Error during creation of DDIC sources of Open Hub Destination ZF3HMYOH" and "Database table /BIC/OHZF3HMYOH contains data and cannot be deleted".

So my question: Is there no way around deleting all the content in the destination table (and the requests in BW)?

P.S. OpenHub is set to semantic key with "Keep data and overwrite data sets". Remote connection is an Oracle Database via DBCON.

Thanks
David

entry.title: Open Hub table in SE11 is empty
entry.content:
Hi all,

quite a while ago I was able to view the content of the remote oracle database that is linked to my BW open hub destination in SE11 (table /BIC/OH*).

For some reason, this stopped working (even though in the target I can see the data). It shows no data at all. Anybody experienced the same issue? My BW roles didn't change.

Thanks
David

entry.title: Re: Change Milestone Dates via ABAP
entry.content:
Or can I do it directly on the database with an UPDATE?

Of course, NO: it would be your responsibility if something goes wrong with the standard programs.

 

Does anyone know an SAP Standard Function etc. to do that?

Did you try BAPI_PROJECT_MAINTAIN?

I go back into "Expand Details Panel" and the four columns are still there.

entry.title: Re: Internal Server Error During MDK Project Deployment o...

@Riyaz_abdul After completing step#3, you should be able to access your MDK web app. Did you see Process finished message in the terminal console?

Could you manually copy the MDK web app from the .project.json in your MDK project? or you can access the MDK web URL from the SAP BTP subaccount space > Applications.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Core Development Tools 3.42.0 vs ABAP Core Devel...
entry.content:
Hi Ign,

what I can tell you is the trial instance itself is accessible. If you are using your company network to connect to the instance please ask your IT colleagues for help to get the right proxy settings. Maybe you can try a different network e.g. your local one at home (I assume you are not using a proxy there), to see if you run into the same issue.

It is hard to offer full support here. So maybe you can open a customer ticket to support you further.

best regards, Ingo

I am trying to establish which SAP module / team is utlising a particular add-on. The add on is DABEXP 140 and it was identified in our SAP readiness report. We are moving for ECC 6 to S/4HANA and this add on was under the heading: "Add-ons which are Certified Third-Party Software Available".

Michelle

entry.title: Issue with MD04 - empty MRP element type Column
entry.content:
Dear Gurus, 

Greetings for the day. We are facing the following issue with a customer. recently we noted for few materials in MD04 the MRP element type column in empty. The Plant is US50 and when we activate the vendor view in MD04, it shows US50 Business Partner and also the Storage location as R01. 

The issue now is that due to these entries, they are considered as receipts and MRP calculations are getting off values. 

The traces of these entries are not anywhere, we checked all the sales orders tables, POs, Production orders etc. and we did not find these items at any level.

Shown below for couple of materials:

 

Cross plant view also for reference. 

it would be of great help if there is any solution for this . 

Thanks in advance. 

Best Regards

Manickath.

@Caetano , @RBrahmankar  please help.

entry.title: Integrating SAP Concur API with SAP SuccessFactors for Automated User Onboarding
entry.content:
Prerequisites

  1. Access to SAP Concur with Admin privileges.
  2. Access to SAP SuccessFactors with Admin privileges.
  3. Access to a development environment with ability to send HTTPS requests (such as Postman or cURL).
  4. Basic understanding of REST APIs and JSON data format.

Authentication

SAP Concur

  1. Generate an API access token:
    • Go to the SAP Concur Admin portal.
    • Navigate to the 'Integrations' or 'APIs' section.
    • Create a new app or use an existing one to get the client ID and client secret.
    • Use these credentials to obtain an OAuth2 accessToken by posting to the /oauth2/v0/token endpoint.

SAP SuccessFactors

  1. Generate an API access token:
    • Log in to SAP SuccessFactors.
    • Go to Admin Center > Manage OAuth2 Client Applications.
    • Create a new OAuth Client providing necessary callback URLs and scopes.
    • Record the client ID and client secret.
    • Use these credentials to obtain an OAuth2 accessToken by sending a POST request to SuccessFactors OAuth token endpoint.

Steps for Integration

Step 1: Extract User Data from SAP SuccessFactors

  1. Make an authorized GET request to the SAP SuccessFactors API endpoint that retrieves user data. Typically, this might look like:
  1. GET /odata/v2/User('userId')

Authorization: Bearer <SuccessFactors access token>

  1. Parse the JSON response to extract necessary user data fields such as FirstName, LastName, Email, etc.

Step 2: Format Data for SAP Concur

  1. Map the extracted user data from SAP SuccessFactors to the corresponding fields expected by the SAP Concur User Profile API.

Step 3: Create User Profile in SAP Concur

1. Construct a JSON payload with the user data formatted for SAP Concur. Example:

 

{
 "User": {
    "LoginID": "<Email>",
    "FirstName": "<FirstName>",
    "LastName": "<LastName>",
    // Include other necessary fields as per the API specification  }
}

2. Make a POST request to the SAP Concur API endpoint (/api/v3.0/profile/users) to create a new user profile:

 

POST /api/v3.0/profile/users
Content-Type: application/json
Authorization: Bearer <Concur access token>
Body: <JSON payload from the previous step>

Check the response:

    • If successful, the API will return a 200 OK status with details of the created user profile.
    • If there are errors (e.g., missing required fields, authentication issues), the API will return an error status code and message. Handle these appropriately (e.g., log errors, retry with corrected data).

Step 4: Error Handling and Logging

  1. Implement error handling to manage failed API requests or unexpected responses.
  2. Log important events and errors to facilitate troubleshooting and auditing of the integration process.

Step 5: Testing and Validation

  1. Perform unit and integration tests to ensure that the integration works as expected under different scenarios.
  2. Validate that new user data in SAP SuccessFactors correctly creates corresponding profiles in SAP Concur without data inconsistency.

entry.title: Re: MTA Apps uses cp.portal
entry.content:
I needed to use an absolute URI, one that uses the work zone prefix composed of the cloud service ID and app ID.
The cloud service ID is field sap.cloud.service in webapp/manifest.json and the app ID is field sap.app.id.
The workzone proxy path is those 2 fields (with all non-alpha characters removed) concatenated with a dot in between
ex: sap.cloud.service = nasa
sap.app.id = rocket.engine.display
proxy path = /nasa.rocketenginedisplay/..
I noticed that the proxy prefix is interestingly starting with a serial number for instance: /a9d98d7c-09a6-42a9-aba8-36f935f378a8.nasa.rocketenginedisplay/
How did i get the proxy prefix? Try the following in your terminal when debugging on workzone, it may help:
this.getMetadata().getManifest["sap.app"].id;
^That command is to confirm your sap.app id (just in case)...
Then follow up with:
jQuery.sap.getModulePath('your_sap_app_id')
This should give you the proxy prefix.

entry.title: Re: SES has been revoked, 102 doc generated but accepeted status not changed
entry.content: Is there a soluction appling a note or running some program ??? I have exactly the same trouble... Tanks !!!

entry.title: Re: HCM Brasil - eSocial S-1.3 - Entrega final

Abraço,

Anderson

entry.title: Re: Creating Custom Data Collection Object in Onboarding 2.0
entry.content:
Hi all,

I've done all steps for one example and worked all OK

when I wanted to replicate with another case, in step 2) I've got the following message, although I made it the same way 2 tests.The Second Step is Associating the Custom Objects to the UserConfig Object

The associations cust_Prueba and cust_onb_attached are working OK. But the last one, cust_Chile has a problem when I try to Save the object

The associations cust_Prueba and cust_onb_attached are working OK. But the last one, cust_Chile has a problem when I try to Save the object

Here, is how I defined this association

 

 

 

Seems that the Source Object column and/or Destination Object Column are not configurated or misconfigurating. But they are the same as the first 2 associations that work OK.

Maybe you can help me in finding why I have this behavior.

Best Regards,

Emi

entry.title: Reimport software collection
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

We would like to know if it's possible to reimport a Software Collection in QAS system ?



Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Reimport software collection
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

It's not possible to "re-import" a collection that was already imported.

In this case, you will need to export the Software Collection again from Dev System and Import the new version (even though there are no changes) in the QAS System.

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Irrelevant Source Document with Processing Status In Process
entry.content:
Dear All,

Documents marked as Irrelevant are still shown in "In Process" status. Is it correct?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Irrelevant Source Document with Processing Status In...
entry.content:
Dear All,

When a document is marked as Irrelevant, it does not mean that it is canceled, but that it is marked as Irrelevant for Accounting. If you filter with 'Unposted Source Documents', the document will no more appear. The Relevance Status appears as Irrelevant and the Processing Status stays as In Process.

It is the expected system behavior.

Refer to the KBA 2925134 - Irrelevant Source Document with Processing Status In Process https://me.sap.com/notes/2925134 for additional details, please.

Thank you.

Regards,
Anderson
SAP Support

entry.title: Setting the metapath in an xml fragment only for the children of the object currently displayed
entry.content:
Dear community,

I have the following UI scenario: A RAP-based OData service is consumed by a Fiori elements generated list report. The user can click on a line in the list report to open an object page. In the object page a table with all children of the specific object is displayed. This all works well with some Fiori elements annotations.

I need, however, to add some other functionalities to the table displaying the children in the object page. I was considering using a custom section in which I wanted to use the FPE table macro. My question know is whether it is possible to set the metapath property of the macro so that only the children of the requested parent objects are displayed. Something like:

<macros:Table xmlns:macros="sap.fe.macros" metaPath="/CurrentParentEntity/_ChildEntity"/>

Is this possible with the macro?

If not: Is this possible with a UI5 table by setting the context path accordingly?

Thanks for your help!

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hello @duane_cornforth,

Constants 401HC and BN109 have been delivered by note 3470796 (BEN: SECURE 2.0 Act - Section 109).
Their values are already the 2025 amounts, as per https://www.irs.gov/newsroom/401k-limit-increases-to-23500-for-2025-ira-limit-remains-7000

So, this is the reason why note 3537136 (BEN: Annual limits for tax year 2025) didn't mention them.

Sincerely thanks,
Carlos

entry.title: Deployment of btp-resource-consumption-monitor from Github
entry.content:
Hi,

I created a trial account on BTP to deploy application SAP-samples/btp-resource-consumption-monitor (https://github.com/SAP-samples/btp-resource-consumption-monitor) all resources needed are avaliable on this trial account.

But when I start to deploy the applications (must be 2 at all 1 db application and 1 run application) just one (db application) are deployed.

Any one have pass through this problem?

Must be because I am using a trial account?

Regards

entry.title: Re: Using class CL_ABAP_PARALLEL for mass parallel dialog work processes
entry.content: @Dan_M , do you happen to have similar sample code for doing parallel database updates?  I am trying to determine if parallel processing will work for multiple calls to an update BAPI - if a call fails, I don't want to roll back all of the successful calls, only the call that failed.  If I use a wrapper FM that calls both the update BAPI and BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT (or BAPI_TRANSACTION_ROLLBACK on failure), will parallel processing these commits cause a database deadlock?

entry.title: Issue found PP-WM Staging - PickParts
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Your help will be greatly appreciated. 

We are facing an issue in PP-WM integration; We uses pick list process as production order releases will create Transfer Request (TR) and Transfer order (TO) in SAP.  

System does the batch split while creating the Transfer order (user sometimes manually do the batch split based on the stock availability during TR to TO conversion) and same split should reflect in production order; Also stock reaches to staging bin from warehouse bin. 

From where CO27 will be used to post 261 to production order later.

Recently started seeing below issue:

Above all steps looks fine.   As soon as TO gets confirmed, same should get reflected in Production Order with correct batch split with qty.  But in our case, it does not happen correctly.  All the requirement qty is consolidated to one batch in production component overview screen instead of batch split.  

Attached the example screenshot:

For below material, total requirement qty was 4560 EA and system split these quantity in two batches when TO created

1st batch - 1530590 - 1616 EA

2nd batch - 1530589 - 2944 EA

Transfer Order

Production Order

For the 1st batch, requirement qty become ZERO; All the required qty consolidated to second batch.  

Note: Third split is for the Fixed qty (56 EA), and it is correct. 

Not sure what had happened and users informed that it started seeing after S4Hana upgrade; 

Please help me to find the root cause if anyone come across the same situation; I couldn't find any thread similar to this in the community.

entry.title: Re: Backorder Processing in aATP - SAP S4 HANA
entry.content:
hi @nipunr ,

Thanks for response.

I have a custom configuration rule from Custom BOP Sorting app; App Id: F298.

The problem presented is due to business necessity, we need to distribute equitable amounts for certain sales order of the same priority.

Example: 3 orders in the same priority for us, We have 300 PZ in stock
1 customer ordered 300
2 customer ordered 100
3 customer ordered 100

I want to define a rule that distributes 300 pieces of stock according to the percentage of orders confirming in the following way

1 customer confirmed 100
2 customer confirmed 100
3 customer confirmed 100.

With the current configures redistribution rule, the system confirms 300 items for the first order and leaves the last 2 with confirmation at 0.

Regards

entry.title: Connection between OCRT and OINV (SAP B1)
entry.content:
What's the connection between OCRT and OINV (SAP B1), please?

I saw this example: OINV ON OINV."DocEntry" = RCT2."DocEntry", but in my case this doesn't work. Do you, guys, know, other way?

entry.title: How to delete an WM outbound delivery?
entry.content:
We need to delete some outbound deliveries in the customer production system, which has WM.

The deliveries have been picked and we think this may be the reason why we cannot delete them.

We are using the "Run Outbound Process" app. Can you help us?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to delete an WM outbound delivery?
entry.content:
From the S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition on the Warehouse Management perspective, it is not feasible to delete an outbound delivery or a delivery item. To cancel or reject an outbound delivery effectively, you need to "zero out" the relevant items. If you need to cancel the entire delivery, you may zero all the items within that delivery.

For detailed guidance on how to "reject" an outbound delivery and additional information on reversing a posted goods issue, please refer to the following KBAs:

3052822 - Goods Issue reversal process and Outbound Delivery rejection in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Warehouse Management

3126573 - How to reverse outbound deliveries at EWM S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 HANA - Central Finance: A Complete understanding about Central Finance
entry.content:

Does anyone know how license works in CFIN? 

Consideres number of users or only the components that are used?

entry.title: WBS settlement rule is duplicated when BAPI K_SRULE_SAVE_UTASK is ejecuted
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Please help me.
When I create a WBS settlement rule using BAPI K_SRULE_SAVE_UTASK it is created correctly in COBRA and COBRB tables. however, when I verify the settlement rule in transaction CJ20N in update mode it is duplicated in all available lines. When I enter cj20n in view mode I see it correctly.

entry.title: Re: Build Work Zone - Image Widget - Image Resizing
entry.content: No, you can only change the column size by so much, it doesn't let me create a column size small enough to make the image as small as needed.

entry.title: Re: Change Milestone Dates via ABAP
entry.content:
Never change SAP data directly in the database.  Never.  You will violate the SAP maintenance agreement and you'd be on your own for any problems.

As Sandra said research using a BAPI (API).  What version of SAP are you using?

entry.title: Re: CJ9CS not copying the values from production orders
entry.content: That is correct, production order costs post to the production order.  PP Order costs can be moved to the WBS via Settlement.  You will have to use Non-Valuated Project Stock.  And you will not generate WIP for in-work PP orders, the costs would be an expense to the project at settlement.

entry.title: Ensure that you have a database available in space 'dev' within organization
entry.content:
How can I get around this error: Service broker error: Service broker hana-broker failed with: Can not create service instance: There is no database available. Ensure that you have a database available in space 'dev' within organization. 

I need to create an instance to continue the tutotial: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-analytics-cloud-consume-1.html
But are not able to follow after step Create SAP HANA database project because of this error in starting the database project. 
I have read many post in community with similar situation, but the solution given dont work form me as I am using a trial account (the tutorial should work with it) 

Any insight are appreciated

entry.title: Re: Payroll Canada Year End 2024
entry.content: To add to what @jonasben has stated, payroll reads IT463 based on check date. You will have to keep that in mind when updating 463.

entry.title: Re: Payroll Canada Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hello Claudia,

Could you pls let us know if a new box for 2024 RL-1 to be introduced for WT/317-QPP Second Contrib. EE in T596I? If yes, when it will be delivered?

Thanks,

Rory

entry.title: Re: Setup needed on SAP backend to generate events
entry.content:
Hey,

not 100% sure about the difference with SAP Advanced Event Mesh and SAP Event Mesh when it comes to the backend configuration, but I just published a video that shows the end-to-end process for SAP Event Mesh, Sending Events from SAP to SAP Event Mesh on Business Technology Platform

Regards, 

 Holger.

entry.title: Re: Getting started with Scene Text from SAP AI Business Services
entry.content: Hii @Vriddhi , can you pleasde extend this Blog post with , how to use SAP DOX with Build apps. Because that is still a question mark? Many are waiting for that feature

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hello @duane_cornforth,

Constant BN109 is kept from 01/01/2025 to 31/12/9999 with value 1,50.
The value in this parameter is used as multiplying factor to derive the result for "50% more than the regular catch-up limit". As it's 1,50 it means it takes the whole catchup contribution limit (401CL) plus an additional 50%.

Regards,
Carlos

entry.title: Re: Creating Custom Data Collection Object in Onboarding 2.0
entry.content:
Sorry for the above comment.

I had a problem with a field letter. That was the problem, and it was solved.

Best regards,

 

Emi

entry.title: Re: 2H 2024- LRN-152446 Custom card section location is a...
entry.content: @SanthoshPinto, as it stands, the location is differently seen in the environments due to the configuration. The described situation would be related to the custom card section placement: Setting the Position for Custom Cards on the New Learning Home Page.

entry.title: Long text not reflecting in IW33
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am using a bdc program for IW36 to create an order. Once the order is created, I am using fm SAVE_TEXT to update long text. When I go to IW33, my long text is truncated to 40 characters. But in SE37, fm READ_TEXT is returning me the long text. Can anyone tell me why I am unable to see the long text in IW33? I can see lt_otext contains 6 lines. Below is my code for reference.

          ls_oheader-tdid = 'KOPF'.
          ls_oheader-tdobject = 'AUFK'.
          lv_suborder = |{ lv_suborder ALPHA = IN }|.
          ls_oheader-tdname = |{ sy-mandt }{ lv_suborder }|.
          ls_oheader-tdspras = sy-langu.
          ls_oheader-tdform = 'SYSTEM'.
          ls_oheader-tdlinesize = 072.
          ls_oheader-tdtxtlines = lv_count.

          CALL FUNCTION 'SAVE_TEXT'
            EXPORTING
              client          = sy-mandt
              header          = ls_oheader
*              insert          = 'X'
              savemode_direct = 'X'
*             keep_last_changed = abap_true
            TABLES
              lines           = lt_otext
            EXCEPTIONS
              id              = 1
              language        = 2
              name            = 3
              object          = 4
              OTHERS          = 5.
          IF sy-subrc = 0.
            COMMIT WORK.
          ENDIF.

Thanks,

BK

entry.title: Re: 2H 2024- LRN-154053 When managers or supervisors (del...
entry.content: @SanthoshPinto, check if the Learning user role has the "Access User Settings" permission, otherwise add it. With this permission in the user's role, "Options and Settings" should be available. Additional details about this new feature can be found here: The New Learning Home Page Now Supports Delegation Tasks | Delegate Learning Tasks on the New Learning Home Page.

entry.title: Re: 2H 2024-LRN-158971 Automatically importing open conte...
entry.content: @SanthoshPinto, there are open enhancement requests about it (link 1 | link 2).

entry.title: Re: Lease Accounting for Lessees with SAP Business ByDesign based on IFRS 16 / ASC 842
entry.content:
How to add Tax Jurisdiction relevant only for Lease Vehicle purchase example in Pennsylvania i,.e 3% Vendor collected beside the Standard Rate 6%+2%

Thanks,

Chempian Pontie

entry.title: Re: Where can I find cleanOAuthRefreshTokenCronJob? Does cleanOAuthRefreshTokenCronJob exist?
entry.content: Do you know why they use language "de", but not "en"?

entry.title: Re: Error "Date type EPICK is not valid" during creation...
entry.content:
Under IMG >> SCM Extended Warehouse Management >> EWM >> Cross Process settings >> Delivery Warehouse Request >> Date/Times 

go for this profile /SCWM/OUT_PRD_DLV_KTS_KTR then untick EPICK to make it active

entry.title: Re: Using table alias in order by of window expressions - ABAP open SQL
entry.content:
Hi,

Try some like this.

  WITH 
    +table1 AS (
	SELECT
       p~laufd,      " Run Date
       p~laufi,      " Run ID
       chect,        " Check number
       p~zbukr,      " Company code
       pridt,        " Check date
       p~lifnr,      " Vendor code
       p~kunnr,      " Customer
       rp~belnr,     " Document number
       rp~bldat,     " Document date
       p~rwbtr,      " Check amount
       b~sgtxt,      " Item Text
       rp~waers,     " Currency
       p~voidd,      " Voided Check Date
       rp~shkzg,     " Debit/Credit Indicator
       p~vblnr,      " Payment Document Number
       zwels,
       p~hbkid,
       p~hktid,
       p~rzawe,
       text2,
       xblnr,
       rp~zfbdt,
       rp~zbd1t,
       rp~zbd2t,
       rp~zbd3t,
       rp~dmbtr,
       zpstl,
       zort1,
       zstra,
       zpfac,
       landx,
       bezei,
       xbanc,
       bancd,
	   a~belnr AS belnr_aux,
	   a~rbukrs AS rbukrs_aux,
	   a~gjahr AS gjahr_aux,
	   a~ebeln AS ebeln_aux
    FROM payr AS p
    INNER JOIN regup AS rp
      ON  p~laufd = rp~laufd
      AND p~laufi = rp~laufi
      AND p~lifnr = rp~lifnr
      AND p~kunnr = rp~kunnr
      AND p~vblnr = rp~vblnr
    INNER JOIN bseg AS b
      ON  rp~belnr = b~belnr
      AND rp~bukrs = b~bukrs
      AND rp~gjahr = b~gjahr
      AND rp~buzei = b~buzei
    INNER JOIN t042zt AS t
      ON  t~zlsch = p~rzawe
      AND t~spras = @SY-langu
      AND t~land1 = @LC_us
    INNER JOIN t005u AS t005u
      ON  p~zland     = t005u~land1
      AND p~zregi     = t005u~bland
      AND t005u~spras = @SY-langu
    INNER JOIN t005t AS t005t
      ON  p~zland     = t005t~land1
      AND t005t~spras = @SY-langu
    LEFT OUTER JOIN acdoca AS a  ##DB_FEATURE_MODE[TABLE_LEN_MAX1]
      ON  rp~belnr = a~belnr
      AND rp~bukrs = a~rbukrs
      AND rp~gjahr = a~gjahr
      AND a~rldnr = @LC_01
      AND a~blart = @LC_re
      AND a~ebeln <> @space
    WHERE p~zbukr =  @p_bukrs
    AND   p~hbkid =  @p_hbkid
    AND   p~hktid =  @p_accid
    AND   p~rzawe IN @s_paym
    AND   p~laufd IN @s_runon
    AND   p~laufi IN @s_runid
    AND   p~gjahr =  @p_gjahr
    AND   p~vblnr IN @s_paydn
    AND   p~chect IN @s_chkno
    AND ( p~kunnr IN @s_cust
     OR   p~lifnr IN @s_cust )    ##TOO_MANY_ITAB_FIELDS
    BYPASSING BUFFER )
	
	SELECT 
	   laufd,  
       laufi,  
       chect,    
       zbukr,  
       pridt,    
       lifnr,  
       kunnr,  
       belnr, 
       bldat, 
       rwbtr,  
       sgtxt,  
       waers, 
       voidd,  
       shkzg, 
       vblnr,  
       zwels,
       hbkid,
       hktid,
       rzawe,
       text2,
       xblnr,
       zfbdt,
       zbd1t,
       zbd2t,
       zbd3t,
       dmbtr,
       zpstl,
       zort1,
       zstra,
       zpfac,
       landx,
       bezei,
       xbanc,
       bancd,
	   FIRST_VALUE( ebeln ) OVER( PARTITION BY belnr_aux, rbukrs_aux, gjahr_aux
                                    ORDER BY ebeln_aux DESCENDING ) AS ebeln
	FROM +table1
	INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_check).

entry.title: Re: SUM - Error password for SYSTEM does not work
entry.content: Guys here is the solution: you must to change the system password , but you must dont use a special character into the pass. example: ALTER USER SYSTEM IDENTIFIED BY ADM123gst23;

entry.title: Re: Issue Consuming OpenAPI OData from SAP Datasphere in Node.js – Access Token Returns Login Link I
entry.content: I'm also running into the same problem for Postman. I can access my token, but using the token is not outputting json. Is it some type of User permission issue in Datasphere? Or is it related to a licence? Any help is greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Become an Expert Peer for SAP Support Programs!
entry.content:
Hi, Ervin Szolke,

 

I am reaching out regarding the following SAP products:

 

SAP ERP Finance

 

SAP Upgrade

 

SAP SuccessFactors Learning Modules

 

SAP Ariba Sourcing Events

 

SAP Business Procurement Administration

 

SAP Hana

 

 

Could you please let me know how many experts are needed on your platform for the SAP products mentioned above? The reason I ask is that some of my friends have experience with these SAP products. Additionally, since it’s been three weeks since your post was made, I’d like to know if SAP's platform has already hired chat experts, or if there are still vacancies available for experts in these SAP products?

entry.title: Re: MTA Apps uses cp.portal
entry.content:
Thanks @DavidGir I'm now able to get the proxy path which has the internal app ID generated by respective landscape / application (Thanks for tip & please accept my appreciation). 

However, this can be a workaround but not a solution. Isn't that the application should automatically route ? Some of the app, which I'm migrating from Neo to CF with its Odata path is routing properly. YAML & XS-APP.JSON are exactly same. Not sure why this routing issue is happening only with few apps. I will raise an SAP incident as well to understand what is happening here and why routing is not happening automatically over the YAML specified path + xs-app.json details. As per SAP tutorials & documentations, this should happen automatically.

For your issue - is this how you have solved and moved to Prod ? Wanted to get the view, hence asking. In the meanwhile, If SAP replies with any further insights - I will come back and update here. At present, I'm going to go with the provided workaround for timebeing.

entry.title: Re: SAP COMMERCE CLOUD SYSTEM MONITORING AND MAINTENANCE
entry.content:
Great blog

As part of CCCv2, SAP has Performance Health Check service entitlement in Std and premuim edition

How can customers use this Service. Is it via SAP for me or SAP store?

Regards

entry.title: Re: PReq release from SBWP link goes to ME53N , NOT ME54N
entry.content: not sure why but in abap RSWUEXEC method EXECUTEMETHODE ( object type BWFUTLCALL ) it is determining to execute the DEFAULT method

entry.title: Re: Assistance Needed with URL Mashup App Error in SAP B1...
entry.content:
Hello Rahul,

Would you add your SAP Business One Web client domain as a trusted domain with reference to the Configure Security Settings?

The Trusted domain in BTP Subaccount serves as the frame-ancestors directive in the Content Security Policy (CSP) of Fiori applications. Add the domain of the SAP Business One Web Client, which embeds Fiori applications within an iframe, to the Trusted Domain settings in your BTP subaccount.  

FYI, from SAP Business One 10.0 FP 2305, the Web client introduced CSP to further enhance its security. The Default CSP settings, with its frame-src configuration, allow embedding Fiori applications from the domain *.hana.ondemand.com. in your case, you don't need to change this default CSP settings.

Regards
EunSeok

entry.title: Re: PReq release from SBWP link goes to ME53N , NOT ME54N
entry.content: Here in lv_context_handle->element_get   name =  "IM_EXECUTION_SERVICE".  This gives back 0002 which then causes the default method to execute  ( which is display for BUS2009 )

entry.title: Re: SAP Approuter - User API Service
entry.content:
Hi Dries, 

I'm working with a managed approuter, i deploy my html5 app in build work zone, do you know how to make it work? Like the last comment on the blog, I'm stuck with this.

Best regards.

entry.title: Looking for Entity-Relations Diagram of S/4 HANA Cloud database
entry.content:
Hi community members,
Now, I'm tackling the designing of Cloud Integration from S/4 HANA DB(pub cloud) to other cloud DB services.

And I'm looking for ER diagram of S/4 HANA.
Does anyone know where ER diagram of it is?

Regards,
Gos

entry.title: Re: Urgent Issue : Transport API Management with TMS to different tenant
entry.content: Solution for this Issue:Your BTP sub account should not be trial account. If you attempt creating APIM instance with trial account, the attempt is rejected.

entry.title: remove these margins
entry.content:
Regarding the left and right margins that appear on a page created with SAPUI5, is there any way to reduce or remove these margins?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: remove these margins
entry.content:

entry.title: Re: Getting User Information in BTP Launchpad
entry.content:
Hi Mio Yasutake,

Thanks this works fine with managed approuter in sap build work zone.
Do you know if this approach works with a custom idP? or il need some extra steps.

Regards.

entry.title: How to change PO price by BADI ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST
entry.content:
While I am changing PO price at ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST~PROCESS_ITEM with code like followed, but the price will be changed after check(save) button clicked.

    DATA: lt_pr1      TYPE mmpur_tkomv.
    CALL METHOD im_item->get_conditions
      IMPORTING
        ex_conditions = lt_pr1.

    READ TABLE lt_pr1 ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<pr1>) WITH KEY kschl = 'PB00'.
    IF sy-subrc = 0.
      <pr1>-kbetr = <pr1>-kposn.
      CALL METHOD im_item->set_conditions
        EXPORTING
          im_conditions = lt_pr1.
    ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: How to change PO price by BADI ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST
entry.content: This question has been bothering me for a long time and I cannot find the answer. I am grateful for someone who can guide me

entry.title: Re: Connection between OCRT and OINV (SAP B1)
entry.content:
Hi @barbaragalantin ,

SELECT T0."DocNum",T0."InvoiceId",T0."DocEntry",T0."InvType",T0."SumApplied",T1."DocEntry",T1."DocNum"
FROM RCT2 T0
INNER JOIN OINV T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."DocEntry" AND T0."InvType" = T1."ObjType";

I have tried this query in 5 different localisation SBO companies and each one gives me the correct result.
Could you please try this one or share the one you have prepared?

Thanks.

Manish

entry.title: How to provide default date with cap actions
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have custom action in CAP, Any way to default initial date to first day of the month and Final Date to last day of the month?

 
  action updateInvoices
(InitialDate : Date  @Common.Label:'Start Date'  @mandatory,
  FinalDate : Date  @Common.Label:'End Date'  @mandatory)

entry.title: Re: Call API returns code 500
entry.content:
Hi hagit

i see nobody picked this up, so let me try to help you. Obviously you know that the code miss an endif AND there is no output of any kind as the code is uploaded to an abap system. My idea is that, good you reached the soap url with correct login and password but what ever soap you are contacting has some format (at least) requirement in the payload that you are not passing through your code. hope this helps! A

entry.title: Re: MTA Apps uses cp.portal
entry.content: @rmnachi_kx As you have well identified, it should be done automatically through routing and what I have done on my end is indeed a workaround. I have not moved to prod yet with this. We also have other apps that did not present this issue. I would also be interested to know the solution.

entry.title: Re: Customer Data Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @Frank6 Frank, If you're looking for step by step guides on how to send API calls to CDC, please refer to the following videos:

https://learning.sap.com/videos/exploring-accounts-api-in-sap-customer-data-cloud

https://learning.sap.com/videos/authenticating-rest-api-calls-in-sap-customer-data-cloud

entry.title: Re: I want to Verify the Account at the time of account c...
entry.content:
Hi @Rvanjari It could depends on how you would like to verify the customer accounts, you can leverage the Identity Verification policies. 

If you wanted to implement more advanced custom verification logics, you can try out the CDC extensions to host your own endpoints.

entry.title: Re: How to change PO price by BADI ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST
entry.content: When do you want the price change to happen. Does it happen on save.

entry.title: FRUN: Long running job issue
entry.content:
Hi Team,
In job monitoring use case we can't be able to monitoring the long running jobs .
please help us with how to configure the long running jobs in sap focused run and how the alerts may triggered.
Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: FRUN: Long running job issue
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

The "Analysis" & "Trend Graphs" & "Alert" functionalities in the Job & Automation Monitoring can be used to monitor the long running jobs. 

  • which are the long running jobs and check if they deteriorate
  • for a job, if there are times with high run time or high failure rate
  • if periodic jobs have overlapping/parallel executions
  • The alert type "Critical Runtime": The event is raised if the run time of a job execution exceeds the threshold set by you.

For more detailed information, please see https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-focused-run/expert-portal/job-and-automation-monitoring.html.

Best regards,
Vera Jiang 

  •
